audit_items.proof_trace: At L798, `_getAssetPrice(s_assetOut, withValidation)` directly passes through the `withValidation` parameter with no override. All three callers (bid at L442, getAssetOutAmount view at L766, GPV2CompatibleAuction at L154) consistently supply the same validation mode for both the assetIn price fetch (done before the call) and for `_getAssetOutAmount`, so assetIn and assetOut prices are always fetched under the same validation mode.
